title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Turning Point
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #28, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #29 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #28, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You could try putting on some trousers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you want your trunks back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...then you'll have to join our crew!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey!! The tiger is on fire!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: What's this?! Some kind of foul beast?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...then you will NEVER escape this islandun!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And then I'll get even stronger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...to inspire this sudden burst of passion?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It was a message from our captain....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You're one of us now, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing?!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #28, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: turning point.
